title: Firewall alert received
message: INC-2026-00426 reports Firewall rule blocking application traffic on FW-PERIM-02.

payload.current_state: TCP 8443 from app subnet to partner API VIP is denied after recent rule change.
payload.requested_outcome: Restore approved traffic while preserving rule-change evidence.

title: SOP retrieved
message: Compare recent rules, avoid broad allows, require approval, and validate specific port reachability.

payload.title: Firewall Rule Regression Remediation
controls: Compare the failing flow against recent rule changes.
Do not create broad any-any allows.
Validate only the approved source, destination, and port.

title: Historical tickets compared
message: 5 similar tickets found; 1 unsafe precedent flagged.

items.summary: Rolled back specific deny rule after flow comparison.
Added narrow allow for approved source and destination.
Validated rule hit count and app port health.
Operator created temporary any-any allow during outage.
items.notes: Unsafe precedent: overbroad access violated firewall policy.

items.summary: Rollback did not restore traffic due to upstream route issue.

title: SOP beats history
message: Unsafe history used an any-any allow; SOP requires a narrow approved flow only.

blocked_precedent.summary: Operator created temporary any-any allow during outage.
blocked_precedent.notes: Unsafe precedent: overbroad access violated firewall policy.

title: Evidence summary structured
message: Proceed with SOP-governed mock remediation for Firewall rule blocking application traffic.

payload.outcome: Proceed with SOP-governed mock remediation for Firewall rule blocking application traffic.
sop_controls: Compare the failing flow against recent rule changes.
Do not create broad any-any allows.
Validate only the approved source, destination, and port.
payload.governance_note: SOP beats history: HIST-FW-2026-009 is visible as a warning, not copied into the remediation plan.

title: Safe remediation plan generated
message: Roll back the specific deny rule in mock mode and validate TCP 8443 reachability.

payload.summary: Roll back the specific deny rule in mock mode and validate TCP 8443 reachability.
payload.action_preview: Mock action: disable deny rule CHG-7782 and stage approved allow for AppSubnet to PartnerAPI TCP 8443.
payload.estimated_effect: Port reachability changes from denied to allowed for the approved flow only.
safeguards: Human approval is required before remediation.
SOP controls override unsafe historical precedent.
validation_steps: Confirm recent rule CHG-7782 matches failed flow.
Confirm no broad source or destination was opened.
payload.escalation_condition: Escalate to firewall engineering if rule baseline cannot be reconciled.

title: Policy gate passed with approval hold
message: Policy allows planning but requires human approval before mock execution.

checks.name: Target scope
checks.message: Targets are limited to approved scenario resources.

checks.name: Dry-run guard
checks.message: Plan uses a dry-run or mock-only action preview.

checks.name: Human approval
checks.message: Human approval is required before remediation.

validation_steps: Confirm recent rule CHG-7782 matches failed flow.
Confirm no broad source or destination was opened.

checks.name: Mock-only execution
checks.message: Plan is constrained to mock execution.

title: Approval package structured
message: Approve mock-only remediation for Firewall rule blocking application traffic.

payload.operator_message: Approve mock-only remediation for Firewall rule blocking application traffic.
payload.expected_safe_effect: Port reachability changes from denied to allowed for the approved flow only.

title: Human approval required
message: Operator review is required before mock remediation can continue.

payload.side_effects: Replay mode disables approval side effects.

title: Mock remediation executed
message: Mock firewall rollback restored the approved TCP 8443 flow without broad access.

title: Scenario validation passed
message: Partner API TCP 8443 reachability moved from denied to allowed for the scoped flow.

payload.name: Scenario validation
payload.message: Partner API TCP 8443 reachability moved from denied to allowed for the scoped flow.

title: RCA and audit evidence generated
message: A recent deny rule overlapped the approved Partner API flow.

payload.root_cause: A recent deny rule overlapped the approved Partner API flow.
actions_taken: Compared failed flow with recent change.
payload.validation: Partner API TCP 8443 reachability moved from denied to allowed for the scoped flow.
payload.business_impact: Partner API Gateway remained protected during the synthetic workflow.
follow_up: Require diff review for deny rules.

title: Closure decision required
message: Remediation is validated. Operator can close the incident now or keep it under observation before closure.

options.label: Approve closure
options.message: Close the incident with RCA and audit evidence attached.

options.label: Observe first
options.message: Keep the incident under observation, recheck metrics, then close.

title: Incident closed
message: INC-2026-00426 was closed with RCA, evidence, and validation attached.
